## Type of change

<!-- Pick one. -->

- [ ] `fix:` bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] `feat:` new tool / flag / behavior (non-breaking)
- [ ] `feat!:` / `fix!:` BREAKING change (will require a major bump)
- [ ] `docs:` documentation only
- [ ] `chore:` / `ci:` / `test:` not user-visible
- [ ] `refactor:` no functional change

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have not pasted any `SUBSTACK_SESSION_TOKEN` value in this PR
- [ ] If this changes a public API or MCP tool surface, I updated the README and the relevant tool description
- [ ] If this affects auth / cookies / writes, I updated [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) or [PRIVACY.md](../PRIVACY.md)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
